Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Use {f 1 3 121} to rotate the camera. Pressing {f 1 3 119} will recenter the camera behind the protagonist.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Hold {f 1 3 104} to focus your view closer in on the protagonist. Pressing {f 1 3 105} will reset the camera.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}In some locations, the camera will be locked in place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Whenever it's available, using the camera will help you to get a good sense of your environment.[n]{f 1 1}
